# Studio Via Mentana — Full Content

## Property Overview
Studio Via Mentana is an elegant studio apartment (monolocale) located in the heart of Rome, Italy.
The property is available for short-term rental through Airbnb.

Airbnb URL: https://www.airbnb.mx/rooms/1005789413503850183
Virtual 360 Tour: https://kuula.co/share/collection/7MVhN

---

## Description
An elegant studio apartment located in the heart of Rome, just steps away from the city's main
attractions. The studio has been tastefully renovated, blending classic Roman elements with modern
comforts. Ideal for couples or solo travelers who want to experience Rome like a local.

### Amenities
- Full kitchen (equipped with all necessary utensils and appliances)
- Refrigerator
- Private bathroom (with shower)
- High-speed WiFi
- Air conditioning
- Washing machine

---

## Location
Neighborhood: Esquilino, Rome, Italy
The studio is located in one of Rome's most vibrant and authentic neighborhoods, just a few minutes'
walk from the Colosseum and Termini Station. The area offers everything needed: local markets,
traditional restaurants, and excellent public transport connections.

### Nearby Points of Interest

**Pizzerias:**
- Pizzarium Bonci — world-famous Roman pizza al taglio
- Da Remo — classic Testaccio-style pizzeria
- Pizzeria Ai Marmi — traditional Roman pizza

**Coffee:**
- Caffè Sant'Eustachio — one of Rome's best espresso bars since 1938
- Bar San Calisto — beloved local bar in Trastevere

**Libraries:**
- Biblioteca Nazionale Centrale di Roma — Italy's largest library
- Biblioteca di Storia Moderna e Contemporanea

**Metro:**
- Metro Line B — Termini Station (2 min walk)
- Metro Line A — Repubblica Station (8 min walk)

**Bus:**
- Line 40 — connects to Historic Center and Vatican
- Line 64 — connects to Vatican and main tourist areas

---
